protein_name: Integrin alpha-X/beta-2 is a receptor for fibrinogen. It recognizes the sequence G-P-R in fibrinogen. It mediates cell-cell interaction during inflammatory responses. It is especially important in monocyte adhesion and chemotaxis. Belongs to the integrin alpha chain family. Predominantly expressed in monocytes and granulocytes. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
